message:
Remove unused multiline string variable from e2e test fixture

The sample.py test fixture contained an assigned multiline string
variable (text = triple-quoted string) that was never referenced
elsewhere in the file. Removing the dead code to keep the fixture
minimal and focused.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,9 +16,6 @@ def main():
     for i in range(data["count"]):
         print(i)
 
-    text = '''multi
-line
-string'''
 
     # comment
     if data["items"]:
